title: The Tower Battles Begin
description: The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Nico Robin, Chopper. The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Having the world as your enemy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'd be happy to live with that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We'll rescue you at any cost!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Courtyard in front of the Courthouse

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: I won't let you do that!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is the end of your life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kumadori
dialogue.text: And I, in the middle, am...

summary: The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.
